structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-09-19 NMI Confirms Support of Increased Conforming Loan Limits
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-09-19 13:04:27-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

On 9/18/2025 Capital Markets issued an announcement detailing NOVA’s support of increased loan limits on Standard Conventional Loans for 1-4 unit properties.  At the time of the announcement, there had not been any MI Companies that had confirmed whether they would also support these limits.  As of today, National MI has confirmed their support.  Their announcement in doing so is below.  As a reminder, this is not confirmation that these will be the new 2026 Conforming Loan Limits; we expect FHFA to issue their official announcement on this in November of 2025. 

 

NATIONAL MI ANNOUNCEMENT

National MI is pleased to announce a temporary increase to the AUS
conforming loan amounts as follows:

Property Type

Conforming Loan Amounts

Contiguous States & District of Columbia

Alaska & Hawaii

1-unit

$819,000

$1,229,000

2-unit

$1,049,000

$1,573,000

3-unit

$1,268,000

$1,902,000

4-unit

$1,576,000

$2,363,000

*	Other than the AUS being ineligible due to the increased conforming loan amount, the loan must comply with National MI’s TrueGuide® AUS
	Conforming Loans or AUS Affordable Lending Eligibility Matrices.
*	At this time, there is no change to National MI’s TrueGuide® AUS
	Conforming High Balance Loans Eligibility Matrix requirements.
*	Note that the temporary loan amount increases may exceed the
	permanent GSE updates to be announced during Q4 2025.
	Master Policy Holders must make their own determinations as to whether to originate loans to any temporary limits.

For submissions to National MI on or after 9/17/2025, National MI will insure AUS loans within the increased conforming loan amounts as follows: 

*	For non-delegated MI submissions, National MI’s underwriting team is
	already applying the increased conforming loan amount limit.
*	If you experience any issues with the following items, please contact our Solution Center (855.317.4664 <tel:8553174664>  or solutioncenter@nationalmi.com <mailto:solutioncenter@nationalmi.com?subject=Loan%20Limit%20Assistance>  – with “Loan Limit Assistance” in the email subject line): 

	*	Rate Quote issues: National MI will provide the appropriate rate quote.
	*	Delegated MI submissions: National MI will adjust our systems and issue the MI Commitment.

For submissions to National MI on or after the GSEs announce new
conforming loan amount limits for 2026: 

*	National MI’s loan amount limits will be aligned with the GSE’s higher conforming limits (both standard and high balance) as of the date of the GSE’s announcements. Such new limits (affecting the limits in the AUS Conforming, AUS Conforming High Balance, AUS Affordable Lending,
	Non-AUS Conforming, and Non-AUS Affordable matrices in the TrueGuide) will initially be supported in the same manner described above for the temporary increases, and later systematically (effective date to be published at a later date). National MI will publish a bulletin and issue an update to National MI’s TrueGuide Eligibility Matrices incorporating the new GSE loan amount limits.

For complete details on our rates and guidelines please visit nationalmi.com <https://go.nationalmi.com/e/683343/2025-09-19/fgvvb/1416772896/h/ryAWQASTgAPAMgDcrcldbrGekd9hH_RXrE9pce7C4Qo> .

 

ATTACHMENTS

*	9/18/2025 CAPITAL MARKETS ANNOUNCEMENT
